title: Sweet Brazilian Sherry Pilaf
description: A grassy, molten dish featuring sweet sherry, perfect for a low-fat dinner option. This Brazilian-inspired pilaf is a show-stopper, sure to impress your dinner guests.

ingredients.name: Sherry vinegar
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet sherry vinegar for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Sweet sherry
ingredients.notes: A dry sherry will not give the same depth of flavor as a sweet sherry.

ingredients.name: Chicken broth
ingredients.notes: Use low-sodium broth for a healthier option.

ingredients.name: Minced fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: Use fresh cilantro for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: Use a low-fat butter for a healthier option.

instructions: Heat the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and saut5e until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, diced ginger, and sherry vinegar to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the sweet sherry and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the cooked rice to the saucepan and stir to combine.
